title: Biden faces crucial day to answer critics amid growing Dem dissent: Updates
shortDescription: President Joe Biden is set to hold a highly anticipated press conference Thursday, giving him a chance to respond to his Democratic skeptics.

title: Nevada swing county board refuses to certify election result
shortDescription: The Washoe County Commission certifies elections in the evenly split Reno area. Republican commissioners just voted against certifying a result.

title: To Democrats, it's not just their nominee but democracy on the ballot
shortDescription: In choosing a nominee, many Democrats believe the presidency, control of the House and Senate, and the future of the Republic are all in the balance.

title: Democrats take aim at Project 2025, the sweeping conservative plan
shortDescription: Democrats started attacking Project 2025 even before President Joe Biden's rocky debate performance against former President Donald Trump.

title: Got 'election anxiety'? You're not alone.
shortDescription: Polls taken this spring found many Americans are suffering from election anxiety - and the figure is likely rising.

title: First Senate Dem calls on Biden to leave presidential race after debate disaster
shortDescription: Sen. Peter Welch's opinion piece comes the day before Senate Democrats are set to meet with Biden campaign officials.

title: Senate Democrats to meet with Biden campaign as concerns spike
shortDescription: The meeting comes as more and more lawmakers publicly air concerns with President Joe Biden's ability to win in November.

title: Democrats on Biden: From 'Need a new nominee' to 'Bad debates happen'
shortDescription: After Joe Biden's debate performance, several lawmakers and leaders have weighed in on whether he should leave the race. Here is what they are saying.

title: Sailor tried peeking into President Biden's medical file: Navy
shortDescription: The sailor, acting out of 'curiosity,' did not gain access to the president's records, the Navy said.

title: Joe Biden to speak with Lester Holt in another TV interview
shortDescription: President Joe Biden will participate in another one-on-one interview on Monday this time with NBC News anchor Lester Holt on Monday, July 15.

title: OnPolitics: Trump dishes on imminent vice president pick
shortDescription: Trump said he’ll make his vice president pick “close to the convention.” Here's what he's said about his top choices.

title: AOC files articles of impeachment against Supreme Court justices

title: Senators reach agreement to advance legislation to ban stock trading
shortDescription: Four senators reached a bipartisan agreement Wednesday to advance legislation that would ban stock trading among members of Congress.

title: Trump dishes on potential VP picks, says he's OK with a bearded VP

title: Donald Trump's ex-wife is 'open' to being his running mate
shortDescription: Donald Trump's second wife Marla Maples said she is "open" to serving as the former president's 2024 running mate.

title: President Biden's dam begins to crack with new Democratic detractors
shortDescription: Warnings from well-known Democrats and celebs are coming just when it looked like Biden was starting to unite lawmakers around his embattled 2024 bid.

title: See how bettors view the 2024 Presidential election
shortDescription: Bettors have shifted towards Trump over Biden in the 2024 Presidential election after the first debate. See where the betting odds stand.

title: False claim Project 2025 is Trump's second-term plan | Fact check
shortDescription: Though the project includes people in Trump's orbit, he said he is not involved with the effort. Project 2025 said it doesn't speak for any candidate.

title: Clooney argues Biden should leave the race and Dems have a new nominee

title: Can Biden be forced out? Here's what we know
shortDescription: Biden has repeatedly said he is not dropping out, but some Democrats have urged him to step aside. Can he be pushed out? USA TODAY's Susan Page explains. Here's what we know.

title: No, Biden didn't order DOJ to arrest SCOTUS justices | Fact check
shortDescription: The post doesn't provide any evidence that Biden ordered the arrests, and there are no credible reports of him doing so.

title: Trump talks Rubio, new debate with Biden
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump called for another debate with Biden and challenged him to a golf match at a campaign stop in Florida.

title: ABC anchor caught talking about Biden's ability days after interview

title: Pelosi on Biden: 'I want him to do whatever he decides'
